description.value: Price 50,000 gp; Slot none; CL 9th; Weight 3 lbs.; Aura moderate divination DESCRIPTION This bifurcated mithral rod resembles an oversized tuning fork. The forked rod acts as a focus for plane shift, but the plane to which it is attuned to can be adjusted as a standard action âa forked rod can be attuned to any plane that a common tuning fork can be attuned to. Once per day, a forked rod can be used to cast plane shift to the plane it is currently attuned to. Three times per day as a standard action, the user can attack a creature or object with a forked rod as if it were a +1 light mace. On a hit, the forked rod deals no damage, but affects the target with dimensional anchor for 9 minutes. As long as a target is affected in this way, the forked rod is inert and cannot be used to cast plane shift, as a focus for plane shift, or to affect another target with dimensional anchor. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 25,000 gp; Feats Craft Rod; Spells dimensional anchor, plane shift
